description_long: This is a Roman-style helmet featuring a prominent red crest made of bristled material running from front to back along the top. The helmet is primarily constructed from a dark, metallic material with a glossy finish, accented by gold-colored trim and rivets. The cheek guards are articulated and also trimmed in gold, providing both protection and decorative flair. The crest is mounted on a raised arch, giving the helmet a distinctive and authoritative appearance. The overall shape is rounded and contoured to fit the head, with a flared neck guard at the back. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs beyond the metallic and colored elements.
description: A Roman-style helmet with a glossy dark metal shell, gold trim, and a bold red crest running from front to back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full red crest, gold-trimmed cheek guard, and the helmet's rounded, glossy surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the red crest and the symmetrical gold trim along the helmet's edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the red crest and gold cheek guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the crest, the flared neck guard, and the gold trim encircling the helmet.
